name: Linking a new legal entity supplier
fullName: UI ~ Administration - Sub family: Linking a new legal entity supplier

steps.name: When the user goes to the home page
Given the user choose the "UI" strategy for link legal entity
When the user fills the link creation form with JSON file "utils/data/legal_entity_data.json"
When the user closes the modal
When the user goes to the home page
Given the user choose the "UI" strategy for link legal entity
When the user fills the form with invalid legal entity data using the last NIT
When the user closes the modal
When the user goes to the home page
Given the user choose the "UI" strategy for link natural person
When the user fills the natural person form with JSON file "utils/data/legal_entity_data.json"
When the user closes the modal
When the user goes to the home page
Given the user choose the "UI" strategy for link natural person
When the user fills the form with invalid natural person data using the last CC number
When the user closes the modal
